texto: I mean it today. And tomorrow, it will be today again, and I will mean it for that today. It's always today, Pearl. Don't worry about tomorrow, because it's always today, and every today we have, I will mean it. I will not leave you. Not willingly. Dont't make my mistake. Let me unmake it. Don't throw me away.
explicacao: Citação de Gail Dayton sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I mean it today. And tomorrow, it will be today again, and I will mean it for that today. It's al…” articula tempo, heartwarming, romantic em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como romantic.

frase_original: I mean it today. And tomorrow, it will be today again, and I will mean it for that today. It's always today, Pearl. Don't worry about tomorrow, because it's always today, and every today we have, I will mean it. I will not leave you. Not willingly. Dont't make my mistake. Let me unmake it. Don't throw me away.
